calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2005 Off Calendar

Quiet Title
Off Calendar May-03-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Quiet Title-Real Property Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Carl Salcedo.
Steven T. Sager, Esq. for Plaintiff: Dennis J. Kavanaugh, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the oral and documentary evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Patrick J. Kavanaugh, and also all persons unknow, claiming any right, title, estate, lien, or interest in the complaint, adverse to Plaintiff's title thereto.
Judgment for Reformation of Deed in real property commonly known as 1759 Cayuga Ave., San Francisco. See scanned doc. for details of Judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
